title: Electron-Phonon Coupling and Eliashberg Theory Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: Sigma_{eph}(k,omega) = integral g^2 * F(omega') G(k, omega - omega') domega';  T_c = (omega_ln/1.2)*exp(-1.04*(1+lambda)/(lambda - mu* - 0.62*mu*lambda))
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Electron-Phonon Coupling and Eliashberg Theory

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=120) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class EPW (Wannier-EPW interpolation); abinit + E-ph provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
